children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Inspector General of the Department of State and the Foreign Service shall exercise the same authorities with respect to the United States Agency for Global Media as the Inspector General exercises under the Inspector General Act of 1978 and with respect to the Department of State.section 3929 of this title

children.heading: Respect for journalistic integrity of broadcasters
children.label: b Respect for journalistic integrity of broadcasters
children.text: The Inspector General of the Department of State and the Foreign Service shall respect the journalistic integrity of all the broadcasters covered by this chapter and may not evaluate the philosophical or political perspectives reflected in the content of broadcasts.
